initial_draft:
<proposal count> 2 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>The other player countered with 47 ZUP. This is a good price, close to my maximum willingness to pay. I will accept the offer.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message>Sounds good! I accept your offer of 47 ZUP for the X.</message>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and correctly ordered with valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting a trade at 47 ZUP is within the stated willingness to pay (up to 60 ZUP), so it aligns with the goals.
3. Opponent plausibility: The opponent has been progressively decreasing their asking price. Accepting a price of 47 ZUP seems highly plausible, given their previous counteroffer of 47.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason, player answer, and newly proposed trade are all consistent. The message aligns with accepting the trade.
5. Rule compliance: OK. The proposal budget has not been exceeded, and the turn constraints are respected.
</critique>
